TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: mayal ta' squw niwan wal siy 'nxal maras sa blaq balay ung_gak na zyugi'olu sa kawas sa mspat lpgan ga, spzyang balay niwan galan rayxyo na ung_gak sa qsahuy qasa ga ya quw p'ung_gak na ryoko kya German ka pintgqun rrusa' hi' Modern Talking. Modern Talking hya' ga yaquw Thomas Anders kiy Dieter Bohlen msqun sa kawas tay 1983, nanu' pinqwa naha' squw kawas tay 1984 ka qutux qwas qaniy quw ini' bqbaqiy na ana squliq ima' na' gay an nquw krahu' bayhuy siy 'nxal maras sa blaq balay pawngan na qwas, siy 'nxal mwah psbahuy sa kwara' hhalan pzyugi'. kawas tay 1985 lga kbalay sa pingaga' qwas naha' nanak ka "The First Album", kawas tay 1985 lga nanu' quw "Brother Louie"wal galan kkbalay sa qwas na mzimal msyaw qwas qaniy. asa blay tmrang squw blaq balay lalu' na Modern Talking ga, ini' ptnaq quw inllungan naha' ruw msgagay kya sa kawas tay 1987 la, tmsuqan kawas qasa ga phtgun kya na Kosi' na pkbalay rikutu' quw rima' naha' kinbalay qwas naha' nanak ka "In The Garden Of Venus". tayhuk squw kawas tay 1998 la nanu' quw taquw sisay maha yan balay pinsqunan na king ka rrusa' qasa ga msqun mgluq lawziy, nanu' phtgun naha' kya quw binzyagan naha' qwas bblaq pawngan ka "Back For Good", ruw sbiru' naha' kya quw hmzinas rutux seng mang kinblayqan na pintbaziy naha'. misuw qaniy ka spzyang ppqwas ka Thomas Anders ga yasa siy buci' nanak musa' mqwas ana inu' na' hiya', ga nanu' quw ptlubuw gita' ka Dieter Boheln hya' ga qenah balay lokah mhtuw musa' mgsaybang kya squw cingay balay kamuk na mspung giqas na sinsyuw beh Europe.
S.PHON: majal taʔ s~ɕquw niwan wal s~ɕij ʔnxal maras~ɕ s~ɕa βlaq βalaj uŋəɣak na zjuɣiʔolu s~ɕa kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ms~ɕpat lpɣan ɣa, s~ɕpzjaŋ βalaj niwan ɣalan rajxjo na uŋəɣak s~ɕa qs~ɕaħuj qas~ɕa ɣa ja quw pʔuŋəɣak na rjoko kja ɣerman ka pintɣqun rrus~ɕaʔ ħiʔ mo*ern talkiŋ. mo*ern talkiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa jaquw tħomas~ɕ an*ers~ɕ kij *ieter βoħlen ms~ɕqun s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****, nanuʔ pinqwa naħaʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** ka qutux qwas~ɕ qanij quw iniʔ βqβaqij na ana s~ɕquliq imaʔ naʔ ɣaj an nquw kraħuʔ βajħuj s~ɕij ʔnxal maras~ɕ s~ɕa βlaq βalaj pawŋan na qwas~ɕ, s~ɕij ʔnxal mwaħ ps~ɕβaħuj s~ɕa kwaraʔ ħħalan pzjuɣiʔ. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa kβalaj s~ɕa piŋaɣaʔ qwas~ɕ naħaʔ nanak ka "tħe *irs~ɕt alβum", kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa nanuʔ quw "βrotħer louie"wal ɣalan kkβalaj s~ɕa qwas~ɕ na mzimal ms~ɕjaw qwas~ɕ qanij. as~ɕa βlaj tmraŋ s~ɕquw βlaq βalaj laluʔ na mo*ern talkiŋ ɣa, iniʔ ptnaq quw inlluŋan naħaʔ ruw ms~ɕɣaɣaj kja s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** la, tms~ɕuqan kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa pħtɣun kja na kos~ɕiʔ na pkβalaj rikutuʔ quw rimaʔ naħaʔ kinβalaj qwas~ɕ naħaʔ nanak ka "in tħe ɣar*en o* *enus~ɕ". tajħuk s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** la nanuʔ quw taquw s~ɕis~ɕaj maħa jan βalaj pins~ɕqunan na kiŋ ka rrus~ɕaʔ qas~ɕa ɣa ms~ɕqun mɣluq lawzij, nanuʔ pħtɣun naħaʔ kja quw βinzjaɣan naħaʔ qwas~ɕ ββlaq pawŋan ka "βaʦ~ʨk *or ɣoo*", ruw s~ɕβiruʔ naħaʔ kja quw ħmzinas~ɕ rutux s~ɕeŋ maŋ kinβlajqan na pintβazij naħaʔ. mis~ɕuw qanij ka s~ɕpzjaŋ ppqwas~ɕ ka tħomas~ɕ an*ers~ɕ ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕij βuʦ~ʨiʔ nanak mus~ɕaʔ mqwas~ɕ ana inuʔ naʔ ħijaʔ, ɣa nanuʔ quw ptluβuw ɣitaʔ ka *ieter βoħeln ħjaʔ ɣa qenaħ βalaj lokaħ mħtuw mus~ɕaʔ mɣs~ɕajβaŋ kja s~ɕquw ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kamuk na ms~ɕpuŋ ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw βeħ europe.
S.FORM: mayal ta' squw niwan wal siy 'nxal maras sa blaq balay ung_gak na zyugi'olu sa kawas sa mspat lpgan ga, spzyang balay niwan galan rayxyo na ung_gak sa qsahuy qasa ga ya quw p'ung_gak na ryoko kya German ka pintgqun rrusa' hi' Modern Talking. Modern Talking hya' ga yaquw Thomas Anders kiy Dieter Bohlen msqun sa kawas tay 1983, nanu' pinqwa naha' squw kawas tay 1984 ka qutux qwas qaniy quw ini' bqbaqiy na ana squliq ima' na' gay an nquw krahu' bayhuy siy 'nxal maras sa blaq balay pawngan na qwas, siy 'nxal mwah psbahuy sa kwara' hhalan pzyugi'. kawas tay 1985 lga kbalay sa pingaga' qwas naha' nanak ka "The First Album", kawas tay 1985 lga nanu' quw "Brother Louie"wal galan kkbalay sa qwas na mzimal msyaw qwas qaniy. asa blay tmrang squw blaq balay lalu' na Modern Talking ga, ini' ptnaq quw inllungan naha' ruw msgagay kya sa kawas tay 1987 la, tmsuqan kawas qasa ga phtgun kya na Kosi' na pkbalay rikutu' quw rima' naha' kinbalay qwas naha' nanak ka "In The Garden Of Venus". tayhuk squw kawas tay 1998 la nanu' quw taquw sisay maha yan balay pinsqunan na king ka rrusa' qasa ga msqun mgluq lawziy, nanu' phtgun naha' kya quw binzyagan naha' qwas bblaq pawngan ka "Back For Good", ruw sbiru' naha' kya quw hmzinas rutux seng mang kinblayqan na pintbaziy naha'. misuw qaniy ka spzyang ppqwas ka Thomas Anders ga yasa siy buci' nanak musa' mqwas ana inu' na' hiya', ga nanu' quw ptlubuw gita' ka Dieter Boheln hya' ga qenah balay lokah mhtuw musa' mgsaybang kya squw cingay balay kamuk na mspung giqas na sinsyuw beh Europe.
S.PHON: majal taʔ s~ɕquw niwan wal s~ɕij ʔnxal maras~ɕ s~ɕa βlaq βalaj uŋəɣak na zjuɣiʔolu s~ɕa kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ms~ɕpat lpɣan ɣa, s~ɕpzjaŋ βalaj niwan ɣalan rajxjo na uŋəɣak s~ɕa qs~ɕaħuj qas~ɕa ɣa ja quw pʔuŋəɣak na rjoko kja ɣerman ka pintɣqun rrus~ɕaʔ ħiʔ mo*ern talkiŋ. mo*ern talkiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa jaquw tħomas~ɕ an*ers~ɕ kij *ieter βoħlen ms~ɕqun s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****, nanuʔ pinqwa naħaʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** ka qutux qwas~ɕ qanij quw iniʔ βqβaqij na ana s~ɕquliq imaʔ naʔ ɣaj an nquw kraħuʔ βajħuj s~ɕij ʔnxal maras~ɕ s~ɕa βlaq βalaj pawŋan na qwas~ɕ, s~ɕij ʔnxal mwaħ ps~ɕβaħuj s~ɕa kwaraʔ ħħalan pzjuɣiʔ. kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa kβalaj s~ɕa piŋaɣaʔ qwas~ɕ naħaʔ nanak ka "tħe *irs~ɕt alβum", kawas~ɕ taj **** lɣa nanuʔ quw "βrotħer louie"wal ɣalan kkβalaj s~ɕa qwas~ɕ na mzimal ms~ɕjaw qwas~ɕ qanij. as~ɕa βlaj tmraŋ s~ɕquw βlaq βalaj laluʔ na mo*ern talkiŋ ɣa, iniʔ ptnaq quw inlluŋan naħaʔ ruw ms~ɕɣaɣaj kja s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** la, tms~ɕuqan kawas~ɕ qas~ɕa ɣa pħtɣun kja na kos~ɕiʔ na pkβalaj rikutuʔ quw rimaʔ naħaʔ kinβalaj qwas~ɕ naħaʔ nanak ka "in tħe ɣar*en o* *enus~ɕ". tajħuk s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ taj **** la nanuʔ quw taquw s~ɕis~ɕaj maħa jan βalaj pins~ɕqunan na kiŋ ka rrus~ɕaʔ qas~ɕa ɣa ms~ɕqun mɣluq lawzij, nanuʔ pħtɣun naħaʔ kja quw βinzjaɣan naħaʔ qwas~ɕ ββlaq pawŋan ka "βaʦ~ʨk *or ɣoo*", ruw s~ɕβiruʔ naħaʔ kja quw ħmzinas~ɕ rutux s~ɕeŋ maŋ kinβlajqan na pintβazij naħaʔ. mis~ɕuw qanij ka s~ɕpzjaŋ ppqwas~ɕ ka tħomas~ɕ an*ers~ɕ ɣa jas~ɕa s~ɕij βuʦ~ʨiʔ nanak mus~ɕaʔ mqwas~ɕ ana inuʔ naʔ ħijaʔ, ɣa nanuʔ quw ptluβuw ɣitaʔ ka *ieter βoħeln ħjaʔ ɣa qenaħ βalaj lokaħ mħtuw mus~ɕaʔ mɣs~ɕajβaŋ kja s~ɕquw ʦ~ʨiŋaj βalaj kamuk na ms~ɕpuŋ ɣiqas~ɕ na s~ɕins~ɕjuw βeħ europe.
